package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_closure_capture_allocates_in_loop: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag loop-local closures that capture variables in high-frequency paths and may force heap allocation.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule566NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario566Negative(records []Rule566NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
